summary: Backend (local): dual auth works — login returns access_token+refresh_token, /auth/me accepts Bearer header (200) and rejects missing/invalid (401). Frontend (localhost:3000 → Render prod backend): login POST returns HTTP 200 but response body has NO access_token/refresh_token, so nothing stored in localStorage; after 3 reloads user is logged out; Authorization header never sent (nothing to send). Direct curl to Render confirms: response body = {id,email,name,role} only. LOCAL code is correct; Render deployment is stale.
passed: Local backend /auth/login returns access_token and refresh_token in body
Local backend /auth/me rejects requests with no token or bad token (401)
CORS preflight from localhost:3000 to Render OK (allow-credentials, allow-origin echoed)
Frontend AuthContext code correctly stores data.access_token/refresh_token to localStorage if present
Frontend axios interceptor correctly injects Authorization header (verified in code)
Frontend logout path clears localStorage tokens (verified — tokens absent after failed auth flow)

failed.issue: Deployed /api/auth/login response is missing access_token and refresh_token fields (returns only id/email/name/role). Old code is running on kostcharge-backend.onrender.com.
failed.evidence: curl -X POST https://kostcharge-backend.onrender.com/api/auth/login -d '{"email":"admin@kostcharge.com","password":"admin123"}' -> HTTP 200, body: {"id":"6a53...","email":"admin@kostcharge.com","name":"Admin","role":"admin"} — NO tokens. Local backend on :8001 returns the tokens correctly.

failed.issue: After login on localhost:3000 (talking to Render prod), localStorage.access_token=null. All 3 reloads redirect to login. Authorization header never attached to any request (0/9 backend requests carried it).
failed.evidence: Playwright: tokens_stored=false; 3x reload -> on_login=true each time; 9 backend requests captured, 0 with Authorization header.

action_items: Deploy latest backend code to Render (Save to Github → Render auto-deploy) so /api/auth/login returns access_token + refresh_token in body. Lines 383-390 of server.py must be in the deployed build.

After Render redeploys, re-run this UI flow — expected: localStorage tokens present, session survives 3 reloads, Authorization: Bearer <token> header present on all /api/* requests, logout clears localStorage.
Optionally point REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to http://localhost:8001 for local dev testing to validate the fix before pushing to prod.

success_rate.frontend: code correct, integration fails due to stale prod backend
